review_queue.question: Digitize or inspect the cited candidate figure/page for mixture-level compressive-strength values, ages, and units.
review_queue.suggested_action: Open the source PDF/page image and extract values only if mixture labels, age, unit, and values are clear.

main_risks: Some candidate compressive-strength data are figure-only, truncated, or missing mixture/age/value mapping in the supplied packet.
